    def collect_unraisable(config: Config) -> None:

_shared = <astraapi._testclient._SharedServer object at 0x7f45ec423800>

    def _run(_shared=shared):
        try:
            import uvloop
            loop = uvloop.new_event_loop()
        except ImportError:
            try:
                import winloop
                loop = winloop.new_event_loop()
            except ImportError:
                loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
        _shared.loop_ref = loop

_shared = <astraapi._testclient._SharedServer object at 0x7f45ac683980>

    def _run(_shared=shared):
        try:
            import uvloop
            loop = uvloop.new_event_loop()
        except ImportError:
            try:
                import winloop
                loop = winloop.new_event_loop()
            except ImportError:
                loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
        _shared.loop_ref = loop

    def collect_unraisable(config: Config) -> None:
        pop_unraisable = config.stash[unraisable_exceptions].pop
        errors: list[pytest.PytestUnraisableExceptionWarning | RuntimeError] = []
        meta = None

                    break

                    errors.append(hook_error)

    def _run(_shared=shared):

config = <_pytest.config.Config object at 0x7f45f9e641a0>

    def collect_unraisable(config: Config) -> None:
        pop_unraisable = config.stash[unraisable_exceptions].pop
        errors: list[pytest.PytestUnraisableExceptionWarning | RuntimeError] = []
        meta = None
        hook_error = None
        try:
            while True:
                try:
                    meta = pop_unraisable()
                except IndexError:
                    break
    
                if isinstance(meta, BaseException):
                    hook_error = RuntimeError("Failed to process unraisable exception")
                    hook_error.__cause__ = meta
                    errors.append(hook_error)
                    continue
    
                msg = meta.msg
                try:

    def _run(_shared=shared):

    def collect_unraisable(config: Config) -> None:
        pop_unraisable = config.stash[unraisable_exceptions].pop
        errors: list[pytest.PytestUnraisableExceptionWarning | RuntimeError] = []
        meta = None
        hook_error = None
        try:
            while True:
                try:
                    meta = pop_unraisable()
                except IndexError:
                    break
    
                if isinstance(meta, BaseException):
                    hook_error = RuntimeError("Failed to process unraisable exception")
                    hook_error.__cause__ = meta
                    errors.append(hook_error)
                    continue
    
                msg = meta.msg
                try:

_shared = <astraapi._testclient._SharedServer object at 0x7f454c6d5040>

    def _run(_shared=shared):
        try:
            import uvloop
            loop = uvloop.new_event_loop()
        except ImportError:
            try:
                import winloop
                loop = winloop.new_event_loop()
            except ImportError:
                loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
        _shared.loop_ref = loop

    def collect_unraisable(config: Config) -> None:
        pop_unraisable = config.stash[unraisable_exceptions].pop
        errors: list[pytest.PytestUnraisableExceptionWarning | RuntimeError] = []
        meta = None
        hook_error = None
        try:
            while True:
                try:
                    meta = pop_unraisable()
                except IndexError:
                    break
    
                if isinstance(meta, BaseException):
                    hook_error = RuntimeError("Failed to process unraisable exception")
                    hook_error.__cause__ = meta
                    errors.append(hook_error)
                    continue
    
                msg = meta.msg
                try:

_shared = <astraapi._testclient._SharedServer object at 0x7f454c6eb240>

    def _run(_shared=shared):
        try:
            import uvloop
            loop = uvloop.new_event_loop()
        except ImportError:
            try:
                import winloop
                loop = winloop.new_event_loop()
            except ImportError:
                loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
        _shared.loop_ref = loop

        pop_unraisable = config.stash[unraisable_exceptions].pop
        errors: list[pytest.PytestUnraisableExceptionWarning | RuntimeError] = []

_shared = <astraapi._testclient._SharedServer object at 0x7f456c23f5c0>

    def _run(_shared=shared):
        try:
            import uvloop
            loop = uvloop.new_event_loop()
        except ImportError:
            try:
                import winloop
                loop = winloop.new_event_loop()
            except ImportError:
                loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
        _shared.loop_ref = loop

    def collect_unraisable(config: Config) -> None:
        pop_unraisable = config.stash[unraisable_exceptions].pop
        errors: list[pytest.PytestUnraisableExceptionWarning | RuntimeError] = []
        meta = None
        hook_error = None

                    break
    
                if isinstance(meta, BaseException):

                    errors.append(hook_error)

_shared = <astraapi._testclient._SharedServer object at 0x7f454c69be00>

    def _run(_shared=shared):
        try:
            import uvloop
            loop = uvloop.new_event_loop()
        except ImportError:
            try:
                import winloop
                loop = winloop.new_event_loop()
            except ImportError:
                loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
        _shared.loop_ref = loop

    def _run(_shared=shared):
        try:
            import uvloop
            loop = uvloop.new_event_loop()
        except ImportError:
            try:
                import winloop
                loop = winloop.new_event_loop()
            except ImportError:
                loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
        _shared.loop_ref = loop

    def collect_unraisable(config: Config) -> None:
        pop_unraisable = config.stash[unraisable_exceptions].pop
        errors: list[pytest.PytestUnraisableExceptionWarning | RuntimeError] = []
        meta = None
        hook_error = None
        try:
            while True:
                try:
                    meta = pop_unraisable()
                except IndexError:
                    break
    
                if isinstance(meta, BaseException):
                    hook_error = RuntimeError("Failed to process unraisable exception")
                    hook_error.__cause__ = meta
                    errors.append(hook_error)
                    continue
    
                msg = meta.msg
                try:

    def _run(_shared=shared):
        try:
            import uvloop
            loop = uvloop.new_event_loop()
        except ImportError:
            try:
                import winloop
                loop = winloop.new_event_loop()
            except ImportError:
                loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
        _shared.loop_ref = loop

_shared = <astraapi._testclient._SharedServer object at 0x7f44ec57e9c0>

    def _run(_shared=shared):
        try:
            import uvloop
            loop = uvloop.new_event_loop()
        except ImportError:
            try:
                import winloop
                loop = winloop.new_event_loop()
            except ImportError:
                loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)
        _shared.loop_ref = loop

    def collect_unraisable(config: Config) -> None:
        pop_unraisable = config.stash[unraisable_exceptions].pop
        errors: list[pytest.PytestUnraisableExceptionWarning | RuntimeError] = []
        meta = None
        hook_error = None
        try:
            while True:
                try:
                    meta = pop_unraisable()
                except IndexError:
                    break
    
                if isinstance(meta, BaseException):
                    hook_error = RuntimeError("Failed to process unraisable exception")
                    hook_error.__cause__ = meta
                    errors.append(hook_error)
                    continue
    
                msg = meta.msg
                try:

_______________________________ test_read_items ________________________________

    def test_read_items():
        # Before the lifespan starts, "items" is still empty
        assert items == {}
    
        with TestClient(app) as client:
            # Inside the "with TestClient" block, the lifespan starts and items added
            assert items == {"foo": {"name": "Fighters"}, "bar": {"name": "Tenders"}}
    
            response = client.get("/items/foo")
            assert response.status_code == 200
            assert response.json() == {"name": "Fighters"}
    
            # After the requests is done, the items are still there
            assert items == {"foo": {"name": "Fighters"}, "bar": {"name": "Tenders"}}
    
        # The end of the "with TestClient" block simulates terminating the app, so
        # the lifespan ends and items are cleaned up
>       assert items == {}
               ^^^^^^^^^^^
